commit_message:
[aon_timer] Fix prescale_count reset when prescaler value changes [aon_timer] Fix prescale_count reset when prescaler value changes ## Description

This PR fixes issue #25417 where the AON timer prescale counter (`prescale_count_q`) is not reset when a new prescaler value is written to the `wkup_ctrl.prescaler` register.

### Problem

The issue becomes visible in the following scenario:
1. WKUP counter counts (wkup_ctrl.enable=1)
2. WKUP count is disabled (wkup_ctrl.enable=0) leaving `prescale_c
